title: db.rs: bind schema_version as i64 not String
description:
LOCATION: src/db.rs lines 146 and 167

FINDING: CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION is i64, but it is converted to String via .to_string() before being bound to sqlx queries. sqlx can bind i64 directly to SQLite INTEGER columns — the String conversion is unnecessary and wrong-type for the column.

IMPACT: Extra allocation on every startup. More seriously, the stored value is TEXT not INTEGER, so a numeric comparison in SQL (e.g. WHERE value > 3) would be lexicographic — correctness risk if the schema version ever reaches double digits or if a query ever compares it numerically.
